taskflow_code_samples.name: create_task
taskflow_code_samples.code:
def create_task(title: str, assignee: str, priority: int = 1) -> Task:
    """Create a new task in the TaskFlow system."""
    task = Task(title=title, assignee=assignee, priority=priority)
    db.session.add(task)
    db.session.commit()
    return task
taskflow_code_samples.description: Core function for task creation in the TaskFlow API

taskflow_code_samples.name: TaskFilter
taskflow_code_samples.code:
class TaskFilter(BaseModel):
    status: Optional[str] = None
    assignee: Optional[str] = None
    priority: Optional[int] = None
    due_before: Optional[datetime] = None
taskflow_code_samples.description: Pydantic model used for filtering tasks in the API
